summary: Workflow steps 'Test Basic Matching' through 'Test Wildcard Patterns' (lines 18-40) are nearly identical — a matrix job would eliminate the duplication. PS scripts lack Set-StrictMode -Version Latest and top-level $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'. actions/checkout uses tag-only pinning (@v4) not SHA. Core logic and bash harness (set -euo pipefail, exact value assertions) are solid.
